dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: Payment processing errors and ghost charges
Redesign performance drops and interface bugs
Missing tickets and wallet synchronization failures
Language settings ignored and broken localizations
Inaccessible support and broken refund claims
Inaccurate train status and schedule information

insights.title: The recent visual redesign introduced severe performance bottlenecks that render core travel functions unusable.
insights.summary: The layout overhaul transformed a formerly reliable utility into a sluggish interface plagued by endless loading spinners and random crashes. Long-time users trying to check train status, view booked tickets, or search for routes are trapped in infinite loops of server errors. Commuters running late find themselves unable to perform basic actions within reasonable timeframes, forcing them to abandon the app entirely. The visual improvements have come at the total expense of stability, alienating loyal daily travelers.

evidence.name: LU
evidence.quote: Premetto che la usavo da 8 anni con soddisfazione, ma dall'ultima release una tragedia. Lenta, continui errori tecnici (internal server error) uniti ad una navigabilità…

evidence.name: AR
evidence.quote: era ok fimo all'ultimo aggiornamento. Ora è un fastidio ed una pena da utilizzare. Lentissima nel caricamento di ogni schermata. Anche solo visualizzare i biglietti da mostrare a…

evidence.name: FC
evidence.quote: ottima app! Accedendo alla sezione miei viaggi l'app sceglie in autonomia se crashare o riavviarsi, se dovete comprare un treno potete incorrere in errori mai visti tipo che il…

recommendation.cost: These are long-term daily commuters and frequent travellers who relied on the app for years, now expressing deep frustration and abandoning the platform for station kiosks or competitors.
recommendation.action: Audit and refactor the network request payloads and UI thread bottlenecks introduced in the latest layout update to eliminate infinite loading loops and server error popups.
recommendation.rationale: Reviewers explicitly contrast the current broken state with the previous version that functioned smoothly, indicating that the underlying transit data services are sound but the new client-side architecture and UI rendering are failing.
recommendation.signal: Support tickets and low-star reviews stop citing internal server errors and infinite loading spinners during basic navigation.

insights.title: Checkout failures quietly debit customer funds while throwing error screens and withholding tickets.
insights.summary: Users attempt to purchase tickets during their commute or travel, experience an internal server error or payment rejection screen, and discover moments later that their bank accounts were fully debited. Because no booking is generated in the app, passengers board without proof of purchase and face the immediate risk of severe penalties from conductors. These paying customers are being forced into manual bank dispute processes or station ticket lines, destroying their trust in the app for financial transactions. Leaving this unaddressed drives users directly toward competing travel aggregators where checkout actually completes.

evidence.name: MX
evidence.quote: Ho acquistato un biglietto, i soldi sono stati sottratti dal mio conto ma senza biglietto. Ancora devo ricevere il rimborso

evidence.name: RJ
evidence.quote: update 18th May 2026. still The same. I paid and I don't get the ticket. The new app has alot of bugs. the tickets don't update, even after the payment has been deducted it…

evidence.name: PE
evidence.quote: App non più affidabile. 8 volte su 10 genera l'addebito del biglietto (salvo successivo riaccreditamento) ma non il biglietto. Lo sanno bene i controllori, sempre comprensivi a…

recommendation.cost: These are paying commuters and travelers experiencing direct financial theft through ghost charges, and several state they have already switched permanently to rival booking platforms.
recommendation.action: Implement automatic transaction reconciliation that immediately issues tickets or triggers instant automated reversals when a payment gateway confirms a debit that the backend fails to fulfill.
recommendation.rationale: Reviewers note that funds are eventually returned after long delays or manual intervention, proving the payment gateway and bank successfully communicated while the internal order creation service dropped the transaction. Fixing the handshake between payment confirmation and ticket generation stops the phantom debits.
recommendation.signal: One-star reviews stop mentioning money being debited without ticket issuance or needing bank reversals.

insights.title: Broken authentication flows lock legitimate users out of their accounts and fail password recovery.
insights.summary: Users attempting to access their profiles are trapped by unexpected password expiration prompts, credential rejection loops, and non-functional recovery emails. Even after successfully resetting credentials on the web portal, the mobile application continues to reject identical login details or block accounts entirely due to arbitrary rate limits. Passengers who need quick access to their loyalty points, profiles, or tickets find themselves completely locked out before travel. This forces users into endless friction just to reach their personal accounts.

evidence.name: JW
evidence.quote: I set up my account on the website, and using the credentials on the app does not work. Tried resetting multiple times. Useless.

evidence.name: GL
evidence.quote: Used to love this app. Now I can’t log in. I do not use a VPN, have used both cellular and Wi-Fi, and reset my password MANY times. I can log into the website without issue, but…

evidence.name: JP
evidence.quote: the app automatically signed me out and each time I sign in it says the login credentials are wrong.( even after i clearly insert them). also when I changed my password and tried…

recommendation.cost: These are registered customers attempting to manage their existing profiles and tickets who hit a complete wall, leading them to delete the app in exasperation.
recommendation.action: Synchronize the mobile authentication token validation with the web backend to accept verified credentials and repair the password reset email dispatch mechanism.
recommendation.rationale: Reviewers note they can log into the website without issue using the exact same credentials that the app rejects, proving the issue lies in mobile token handling or API synchronization rather than database account validity.
recommendation.signal: Support channels stop receiving complaints about password resets failing or valid credentials being rejected.
